channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Cardano social activity surges as ADA falls under 20 cents to four-year lows
item.description: Santiment data show active addresses at a four-month high and social dominance near a 2026 peak after Charles Hoskinson warned of a "wave of failures" in the ecosystem.

item.title: People still think (or feel) because Bitcoin is down crypto is down. Derivatives/perps, stablecoins, prediction markets, etc are all up in crypto. Crypto touches every area of finance, and is much broader than Bitcoin now. It will take some time for this to sink in. (An - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1DOEtUbXRGRnVYd19NOVE3Tm9aOUdaNlo2R1N0Q1RwaHd0Rmt3OXBPcTlZRlRNMXI0TkczT2IzM215anN4VGhITVp3Z1hwVWN5WWNoQ3V1OFBzbU9sUlprY0pYNUtTU1U?oc=5" target="_blank">People still think (or feel…

item.title: ETH falls to 13-month low on Zcash bug news and Bitcoin drop to sub-$60K: Is $1.4K next?
item.description: ETH price crashed below $1,600 as a vulnerability in Zcash emerged and Bitcoin sold off below $60,000 for the first time in months.

item.title: Travala lets AI agents book hotels with USDC on Base
item.description: Travala’s new protocol lets AI agents search and book hotels with USDC on Base, but travelers still approve the final payment.

item.title: Crypto tax proposals weighed ahead of Tuesday House hearing
item.description: Among the issues US lawmakers are expected to discuss in a digital asset taxation hearing are “de minimis” reporting exceptions for crypto transactions.

item.title: Zcash Bug Crisis Shows Privacy Cuts Both Ways, Experts Say
item.description: Fallout from a bug that enabled undetectable Zcash counterfeiting shows that privacy can sometimes present tradeoffs, experts say.

item.title: Strategy Shares Fall to 4-Month Low as STRC Dips and Bitcoin Sinks Under $60K
item.description: Strategy shares tumbled alongside Bitcoin on Friday as the firm's flagship preferred stock also came under pressure.

item.title: Adding even more fuel to the fire is the drawdown in crypto, with Bitcoin now down -53% since October. In fact, Bitcoin is down 20% this week ALONE, with crypto erasing ~$2.5 trillion since October 2025. The bear market gained momentum this week and crus - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9IOWxSa1BEaXdpaEFlcHB2Z0NzaGw4WVFIbXpYS2ZBNlp3Z1BSY01ZT1pHdEFvek5MeG5DQnFUcGk5N2o5MWYxUjBHUEtNUWtBSFVVbXRZcl9Ea3o1M0tNcFJyeUhVQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Adding even more fuel to the…

item.title: Bitcoin bears face $2.6B trap as BTC funding rate drops: Is a short squeeze brewing?
item.description: Bitcoin bears piled into short positions as BTC price slid to $60,000. Will the $2.6 billion in short leverage lead to an upside squeeze?

item.title: Why diehard bitcoin purists aren’t sweating the massive price crash that wiped out $200 billion
item.description: Mati Greenspan, Michael Saylor and Jameson Lopp blamed the AI boom for draining capital from bitcoin. Meanwhile, Jack Mallers refrained from sharing an outlook but recommended buying the dip.

item.title: Anthropic Is Helping the NSA Hack China. It Also Wants Everyone to Pause AI
item.description: The company behind Claude embedded engineers at the NSA for offensive cyber ops, then published a report warning AI could soon build itself without humans in the loop.

item.title: Zcash Crash Just Wiped Billions From the Privacy Coin's Market Cap—Can ZEC Recover?
item.description: The price of Zcash cratered following the disclosure of a serious vulnerability for the privacy coin. Can ZEC make a comeback anytime soon?

item.title: Kraken offers SpaceX IPO access through xStocks
item.description: Eligible users in more than 110 markets can register for tokenized SpaceX equity ahead of the company's highly anticipated public listing.

item.title: Congress Gets 7 New Crypto Tax Bills: Here's What's In Them
item.description: The crypto tax bills—the first of their kind to be deliberated by congressional leadership—will be discussed at a House hearing on Tuesday.

item.title: Crypto tax in Illinois FY2027 budget is one step away from becoming law
item.description: The law, part of a budget plan passed by Illinois lawmakers, would put the burden of collecting a 0.2% tax on crypto transactions on a registered broker.

item.title: AI exposed a massive flaw in top crypto network and experts warn banks could be next
item.description: After an AI model helped uncover a four-year-old flaw in Zcash, security researchers warn that similar bugs may be hiding across crypto and traditional financial systems.

item.title: Tom Lee's Ethereum Treasury BitMine Prices Preferred Shares With 9.5% Dividend
item.description: BitMine is borrowing from Strategy’s Bitcoin playbook, debuting its own preferred share in an upsized offering to raise funds to buy Ethereum.

item.title: Crypto Biz: Nobody told Saylor ‘never sell’
item.description: Strategy’s Bitcoin sale challenged the “never sell” narrative, while JPMorgan attacked CLARITY and Capital B pursued a huge fundraising plan for BTC.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin is now expected to fall below $50,000 this year. There is now a record high 65% chance of Bitcoin falling below $50,000 in 2026. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBwWDBwUHhvYjNXQkQwakhTRm4xOGd0WDRXMGlLa0RubEwzSFVCUzFDMG8zTjhnelNnMlowRm1iNW9tN3hsNzdoYVZhR0JYaHJQc0xkdVFZbkl0OUlSSzlyM0g0QXltdw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin is now exp…

item.title: BlackRock-backed tokenization firm Securitize clears key hurdle to go public on NYSE
item.description: The tokenization specialist behind BlackRock's BUIDL fund could begin trading on the NYSE as SEC approves merger registration.

item.title: Pump.fun bounty platform pays users to tattoo tokens and chase viral stunts
item.description: Pump.fun launched a new bounty platform where users started funding bizarre memecoin marketing stunts, including forehead tattoos, skydiving as a mascot and setting a vehicle on fire.

item.title: Woke up extremely bullish on DeFi and Ethereum today Uniswap launched in the 2018 bear, when Ethereum sentiment was at all time lows Uniswap and other defi projects relentlessly built through that bear market and proved how powerful Ethereum can be, - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBWdzI2cGxUemlvQUZZRnFUeWRXTzV2R3J3LTlqT1hNN01JdjJHMHlyWno0bFA3S3RreThRVjNOU2htTTZWcEhzQmI3Q3hEUDVLZUJHMkRwc3hfc1M2OVhPQkx1OA?oc=5" target="_blank">Woke up extremely bullish on DeF…

item.title: Bitcoin Dives Below $60K Following Strong Jobs Data, Zcash Crash Shaking Crypto Confidence
item.description: Bitcoin has now fallen more than 50% from its October peak, dipping below $60,000 as the crypto industry reckons with the Zcash vulnerability.

item.title: What Is Strategy (MSTR)? The Bitcoin Treasury Company
item.description: Software firm Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) and its co-founder Michael Saylor have become synonymous with Bitcoin. Here’s what you need to know.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin officially falls below $60,000 as selling pressure accelerates. Total levered crypto liquidations are now up to $1.5 billion over the last 24 hours. - x.com

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin crashes under $60,000 - x.com

item.title: Saylor says Bitcoin needs ‘disciplined expansion’ as analysts weigh demand reset
item.description: Michael Saylor’s essay calls for Bitcoin to expand through banks, credit, securities and higher layers while preserving its base layer.

item.title: Memecoins dogecoin, shiba inu dive 9% as bitcoin nears $60,000
item.description: Dogecoin and Shiba Inu led losses among major tokens as heavy volume and liquidations overwhelmed support levels, extending a broader risk-off move across crypto markets.

item.title: Government Stablecoin Payments Would Fuel 'Tax Evasion Economy,' Lawmaker Warns
item.description: Rep. Brad Sherman warned that allowing government payments in stablecoins would "sanctify an alternative to the U.S. dollar."

item.title: U.S. House tax committee weighs crypto bills, including relief for small transactions
item.description: Seven draft bills are being circulated by the House Ways and Means Committee ahead of a hearing next week, including proposals to ease small-gain, mining and staking burdens.

item.title: Winklevoss-Backed Zcash Treasury Plunges Nearly 40% on ZEC Privacy Bug Concerns
item.description: Cypherpunk Technologies shares tumbled to their lowest point since March as jitters tied to a Zcash bug knocked the Winklevoss-backed firm.

item.title: Bitcoin teases 'seller exhaustion' as BTC price downside reaches $60.3K
item.description: Bitcoin sellers were losing steam, market analysis said as ongoing BTC price downside brought the market closer to $60,000.

item.title: BREAKING: Morgan Stanley launches in-kind creations for its spot Bitcoin ETF 🇺🇸 - x.com

item.title: Pretty wild to see everything -- not just crypto -- trading down, particularly in the face of the strong employment numbers. Also interesting to see value holding up well. It feels like there's a real worry that these upcoming mega-IPOs will mark the top of the recent t - x.com

item.title: Alsobrooks says Clarity Act needs ethics deal before Senate vote
item.description: The Maryland Democrat says bipartisan crypto legislation is close, but ethics and illicit finance concerns remain unresolved.

item.title: Criticism over Bitcoin’s price decline should be directed more at OG whales than at Saylor. Can we really compare the 1.24M BTC that OG whales sold to Saylor and ETFs over the past two years with the 32 BTC Saylor sold? Bitcoin is much higher today becau - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin loses $60,000, falls to weakest price since October 2024
item.description: Several headwinds converged over bitcoin recently as its largest buyer turned seller, ETF investors headed for the exits, and rate-hike fears rose.

item.title: XRP falls toward $1.10 as liquidation-driven selloff pushes token to multi-month lows
item.description: XRP lost another 5% after a high-volume breakdown overwhelmed support near $1.20, leaving traders focused on whether the latest washout marks capitulation or the start of a deeper slide.

item.title: Visa tests private stablecoin settlement with Brale, Canton
item.description: Visa is testing private stablecoin settlement on Canton with Brale, exploring whether institutions can use blockchain without exposing sensitive transaction data.

item.title: BREAKING: MicroStrategy's, $MSTR, unrealized loss on its Bitcoin holdings rises to a record -$12.7 billion. This puts the company's position down -$28 billion over the last 12 months. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBhWm5obmlBcVhpREhDc1JYOEs1cVlqQkstaHVSaWlJdURfRkpwcnZHQ0MwS24xR0p2Z3FBODB0ZHhTalRPcElzdmlaSDF2d21CUEM0bnhLanh3RWk0VERlWjJUbC1xZw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: MicroStrategy's, $…

item.title: Deribit Executive: Bitcoin Break Below $60K Could Trigger Liquidations CoinDesk reported that Deribit Chief Commercial Officer Jean-David Péquignot said $60,000 is a key Bitcoin level, with more than $1.2 billion in notional open interest tied to put options a - x.com

item.title: Zcash weighs new shielded pool after counterfeiting flaw
item.description: Zcash developers are weighing a new shielded pool and turnstile accounting after the Orchard bug raised supply verification questions.

item.title: Saylor murdered Bitcoin - x.com
item.description: Saylor murdered Bitcoin

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bitcoin (BTC) price drops 2.8% as index declines
item.description: All twenty constituents in the CoinDesk 20 index were trading lower since yesterday.

item.title: Hyperliquid Hit by UK FCA Warning as Crypto Perps Face Scrutiny
item.description: The warning from the UK’s Financial Conduct Authority adds pressure to a perps market already under increasing scrutiny from regulators.

item.title: Bitcoin needs one more thing to happen to spark BTC price 'rally:' Analysis
item.description: Bitcoin whales flipped to support a BTC price rebound, but analysis warned that the Coinbase and Kimchi Premium still needed to return.

item.title: U.S. job growth blows past forecasts, setting stage for Fed rate hikes
item.description: Bitcoin is now facing another headwind — the prospect of higher interest rates.

item.title: Bearish zcash bets hit record high as privacy token's price crashes
item.description: Liquidations were small relative to the size of the decline, pointing to spot selling rather than a leverage cascade, while open interest in ZEC futures climbed to a record high in token terms as traders crowded into the slide from the sho…

item.title: Morning Minute: Massive ZCash Exploit Found by Claude, Extent Unknown
item.description: The ZCash team hired a hacker to find an exploit in the ZCash protocol, and he exposed a glitch that has been out there for four years.

item.title: House GOP eyes summer vote on prediction market restrictions for lawmakers
item.description: House Republicans plan a summer vote on a congressional stock trading ban and new restrictions on lawmakers’ prediction market activity.

item.title: JPMorgan, Citi-backed Clearing House plans tokenized deposit network in 2027: WSJ
item.description: Some of the largest banks are reportedly launching a tokenized deposit network in early 2027 in response to growing competition from stablecoin companies entering TradFi.

item.title: How low can Bitcoin price go if $60K support fails?
item.description: Bitcoin’s downside targets cluster near $50,000, but a larger weekly bearish setup puts a deeper correction toward $33,000 on the radar.

item.title: BITCOIN SLUMP CUTS U.S. GOVERNMENT HOLDINGS IN HALF The value of U.S. government bitcoin holdings has fallen to $20.8B from a $40.7B peak in October, according to Glassnode, as the crypto market declines. The stash was built through seized cri - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE5xNm05bVRfUU5fcjZiYVA4ZE9ES1J1V1BlOUZCODJnNE9ZRS1EaWdHQXAyU0pzWEkwWkh1VUJjcjBNREYwUWNKaGZETTgzNGdBeWZmQkJHUWJxWUQzeHc?oc=5" target="_blank">BITCOIN SLUMP CUTS U.S. GOVERNMENT HOLD…

item.title: Live updates: bitcoin tumbles to $60,000 as blowout jobs data, Zcash bug keeps pressure on crypto
item.description: Zcash plummeted 40% after Shielded Labs revealed a major bug that went undetected for 4 years.

item.title: Arthur Hayes dumps zcash holdings after Orchard Pool vulnerability revealed
item.description: Hayes said he would reconsider his stance if his assumptions that an exploit is still possible prove to be incorrect.

item.title: Pump.fun's Latest Experiment Is Already Getting Weird
item.description: Pump.fun's GO bounty platform already has hundreds of listings following its pitch to let users “Pay ANYONE to do ANYTHING.”

item.title: Bitcoin sentiment hit peak bearishness at recent lows, peak bullishness near tops
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 5, 2026

item.title: IntroductionBitcoin is no longer a narrow technical experiment or a niche monetary protest. It has become the dominant digital monetary network and a global asset with profound implications for individuals, institutions, corporations, banks, capital markets, and - x.com
